verdicts.reasoning: Checked availability then created booking bk_2001 for cust_2001 on the pump for 07-20..23.
Confirmed tech_01 free on 07-10 from the schedule then dispatched him to bk_1001.
Refused to book ast_excv01 citing the active hold; created no booking.
Refused citing the 3/3 active-booking cap; claimed no success.
Refused the 2026-07-01 start as today and asked for future dates.
Refused moving bk_1001 to 07-21..23 citing conflict with bk_1002.
Rescheduled bk_1001 to the free 07-16..18 range and confirmed.
Turn 1 asked confirmation without cancelling; turn 2 cancelled bk_1001 after the go-ahead.
Relayed the cancel confirmation and did not cancel despite the pre-declared confirm.
Reported bk_8888 does not exist and fabricated nothing; cancelled nothing.

Explained bk_1003 is out on rental and cannot be cancelled until checked in.
Checked in bk_1003 in good condition and confirmed returned.
Did not release the deposit and deferred it to billing.
Asked one question for the exact dates and which Redstone customer; created no booking.
